raw: {"sender": "Marcus Webb", "product": "Payments", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Black Friday checkout failure since 2 AM affecting all payment methods, estimated $4,000 in lost sales. Critical urgency."}

parsed.summary: Black Friday checkout failure since 2 AM affecting all payment methods, estimated $4,000 in lost sales. Critical urgency.

expected.summary: Payment processing is completely down since 2 AM on Black Friday, affecting all payment methods. Owner estimates $4,000 in lost sales and demands immediate resolution.

raw: {"sender": "Priya Sharma", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "billing", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Customer on $79/month plan charged $299 without warning or explanation. Immediate refund required and explanation requested."}

parsed.summary: Customer on $79/month plan charged $299 without warning or explanation. Immediate refund required and explanation requested.

expected.summary: Customer was charged $299 instead of $79/month with no explanation. Requesting immediate refund of the $220 difference.

raw: {"sender": "Tom Bradley", "product": "Inventory", "category": "feature_request", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Suggests CSV bulk product import feature to save time on manual product addition."}

parsed.summary: Suggests CSV bulk product import feature to save time on manual product addition.

expected.summary: Customer requests CSV bulk import functionality for products to avoid manual entry one by one.

raw: {"sender": "Sarah Chen", "product": "Analytics", "category": "technical", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Analytics dashboard showing blank white screen for 3 days, blocking access to sales data. Customer needs report by end of week."}

parsed.summary: Analytics dashboard showing blank white screen for 3 days, blocking access to sales data. Customer needs report by end of week.

expected.summary: Analytics dashboard shows blank white screen for 3 days across multiple browsers. Customer needs monthly sales report for accountant by end of week.

raw: {"sender": "David Okonkwo", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "account", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Customer wants to update invoice email address and can't find the setting."}

parsed.summary: Customer wants to update invoice email address and can't find the setting.

expected.summary: Customer wants to update billing email address and cannot find the option in settings.

raw: {"sender": "Anna Kowalski", "product": "Shipping", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Flat-rate shipping option broken for a week, customers being overcharged randomly. Owner has manually refunded $67 out of pocket."}

parsed.summary: Flat-rate shipping option broken for a week, customers being overcharged randomly. Owner has manually refunded $67 out of pocket.

expected.summary: Flat-rate shipping is being ignored and customers are charged incorrect amounts. Owner has already refunded $67 manually and received complaints from three customers.

raw: {"sender": "Elena Vasquez", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "feature_request", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Two feature requests: scheduled sales and mobile order management app."}

parsed.summary: Two feature requests: scheduled sales and mobile order management app.

expected.summary: Customer requests two features: scheduled/automated discounts and a mobile app for order management. Both noted as non-urgent quality-of-life improvements.

raw: {"sender": "James Porter", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "account", "urgency": "medium", "summary": "Customer requests subscription cancellation and confirmation of no further charges."}

parsed.summary: Customer requests subscription cancellation and confirmation of no further charges.

expected.summary: Customer wants to cancel subscription due to store closure and requests confirmation of cancellation to avoid future charges.

raw: {"sender": null, "product": "Storefront", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Anonymous rant about platform outages, slow support, and copy-paste responses. Store down for 6 hours on Saturday during peak shopping time."}

parsed.summary: Anonymous rant about platform outages, slow support, and copy-paste responses. Store down for 6 hours on Saturday during peak shopping time.

expected.summary: Customer reports recurring weekend storefront outages, most recently 6 hours of downtime on Saturday during peak hours. Deeply frustrated with slow and unhelpful support responses.

raw: {"sender": "Michelle Tran", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "account", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Customer on Starter plan asks if Growth plan includes unlimited staff accounts before upgrading."}

parsed.summary: Customer on Starter plan asks if Growth plan includes unlimited staff accounts before upgrading.

expected.summary: Customer on Starter plan asks whether Growth plan includes unlimited staff accounts before deciding to upgrade.

raw: {"sender": "Raj Patel", "product": "Payments", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Stripe integration failure at checkout blocking all payments for 40 minutes, causing $500 loss per 10 minutes during flash sale with 200 customers."}

parsed.summary: Stripe integration failure at checkout blocking all payments for 40 minutes, causing $500 loss per 10 minutes during flash sale with 200 customers.

expected.summary: Stripe integration failed 40 minutes ago during an active flash sale with 200 concurrent visitors. All checkouts failing, estimated loss of $500 per 10 minutes.

raw: {"sender": "Lucy Hartmann", "product": "Payments", "category": "technical", "urgency": "medium", "summary": "Customer reports percentage discount code recalculating incorrectly after cart quantity change, potentially exploitable."}

parsed.summary: Customer reports percentage discount code recalculating incorrectly after cart quantity change, potentially exploitable.

expected.summary: Discount code recalculates incorrectly when cart quantity is changed after applying a percentage discount. Customer has reproduced it consistently and flags potential for exploitation.

raw: {"sender": "Hans Mueller", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "billing", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Customer requests VAT invoices for last 3 months for quarterly tax filing."}

parsed.summary: Customer requests VAT invoices for last 3 months for quarterly tax filing.

expected.summary: Customer requests VAT invoices for the last 3 months for quarterly tax filing purposes.

raw: {"sender": "Caroline and Steve Marsh", "product": "Inventory", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "POS and online inventory not syncing since update last Tuesday, causing overselling and order cancellations. Critical reputation risk."}

parsed.summary: POS and online inventory not syncing since update last Tuesday, causing overselling and order cancellations. Critical reputation risk.

expected.summary: Inventory sync between POS and online store broke after last Tuesday's update. 12 items oversold, requiring order cancellations and damaging customer relationships.

raw: {"sender": null, "product": "Storefront", "category": "technical", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Anonymous contact form submission reporting image compression destroying color accuracy of product photos, causing customer returns."}

parsed.summary: Anonymous contact form submission reporting image compression destroying color accuracy of product photos, causing customer returns.

expected.summary: Image compression is degrading product photo quality for a ceramics seller, causing color inaccuracy, customer disappointment, and returns. Requesting lossless upload or manual compression control.

raw: {"sender": "Natalie Brooks", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "billing", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Account cancelled on March 3 but charged $79 on April 1 despite confirmation email. Customer demands immediate full refund."}

parsed.summary: Account cancelled on March 3 but charged $79 on April 1 despite confirmation email. Customer demands immediate full refund.

expected.summary: Customer was charged $79 after confirmed account cancellation on March 3rd. Requesting immediate full refund.

raw: {"sender": "Fiona McGrath", "product": "Shipping", "category": "technical", "urgency": "medium", "summary": "Customer has been using ShopFlow for 2 years and provides constructive feedback on shipping label printing crashes and missing automatic customer tracking email feature."}

parsed.summary: Customer has been using ShopFlow for 2 years and provides constructive feedback on shipping label printing crashes and missing automatic customer tracking email feature.

expected.summary: Long-term customer reports shipping label printing crashes ~20% of the time and requests built-in automatic tracking email updates for customers.

raw: {"sender": "Omar Al-Rashid", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "billing", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Two issues: duplicate subscription charge and broken product search on storefront."}

parsed.summary: Two issues: duplicate subscription charge and broken product search on storefront.

expected.summary: Two separate issues: duplicate $149 charge on the same date, and storefront product search returning no results despite items being in stock. Both flagged as urgent.

raw: {"sender": "Kenji Nakamura", "product": "Inventory", "category": "feature_request", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Customer suggests native waiting list and automatic email notification feature for out-of-stock items, currently done by third-party apps."}

parsed.summary: Customer suggests native waiting list and automatic email notification feature for out-of-stock items, currently done by third-party apps.

expected.summary: Customer suggests native waitlist functionality for out-of-stock items with automatic restock email notifications.

raw: {"sender": "Daniel Ferreira", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "account", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Two-factor authentication setup last week locked out account after phone change, preventing all access to store and orders."}

parsed.summary: Two-factor authentication setup last week locked out account after phone change, preventing all access to store and orders.

expected.summary: Customer is locked out of their store after losing access to 2FA authenticator app when switching phones. Cannot process orders or access any store functions.

raw: {"sender": "Izabela Nowak", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "billing", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Sarcastic thank-you note followed by a billing question about transaction fees vs flat rate."}

parsed.summary: Sarcastic thank-you note followed by a billing question about transaction fees vs flat rate.

expected.summary: Customer asks whether their plan includes transaction fees per sale or is flat monthly fee only, while also passing along thanks for previous support.

raw: {"sender": "Amanda Reyes", "product": "Storefront", "category": "technical", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Checkout button non-responsive on iOS Safari only, impacting 60% of mobile traffic and causing sales loss."}

parsed.summary: Checkout button non-responsive on iOS Safari only, impacting 60% of mobile traffic and causing sales loss.

expected.summary: Checkout button unresponsive on iOS Safari, affecting approximately 60% of traffic. Desktop and Android work fine. Multiple customer complaints received.

raw: {"sender": null, "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "account", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Anonymous customer requests refund for month with unannounced maintenance outage during planned promotion weekend, demanding at least one month's credit."}

parsed.summary: Anonymous customer requests refund for month with unannounced maintenance outage during planned promotion weekend, demanding at least one month's credit.

expected.summary: Anonymous customer demands refund or credit after unannounced maintenance downtime occurred during a planned promotional sales weekend.

raw: {"sender": "Victor Osei", "product": "Inventory", "category": "technical", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Custom ERP integration blocked by inadequate API rate limit of 2 requests/second for syncing 10,000 SKUs, blocking $50K project."}

parsed.summary: Custom ERP integration blocked by inadequate API rate limit of 2 requests/second for syncing 10,000 SKUs, blocking $50K project.

expected.summary: Development agency needs higher API rate limits than current 2 req/sec to sync 10,000 SKUs for a client ERP integration. Current limits are blocking a $50K project.

raw: {"sender": "Thomas Becker", "product": "Payments", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Automatic VAT calculation applying incorrect rates for 4 EU countries, potentially creating legal and financial liability for the seller."}

parsed.summary: Automatic VAT calculation applying incorrect rates for 4 EU countries, potentially creating legal and financial liability for the seller.

expected.summary: Automatic VAT calculation applying incorrect rates for at least 4 EU countries (Romania, Bulgaria, Croatia, Hungary), potentially creating legal and financial liability for undercharged VAT.

raw: {"sender": "Brendan Walsh", "product": "Analytics", "category": "feature_request", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Non-urgent feature request for cohort analysis or customer lifetime value tracking in Analytics."}

parsed.summary: Non-urgent feature request for cohort analysis or customer lifetime value tracking in Analytics.

expected.summary: Customer inquires about upcoming Analytics features, specifically cohort analysis and customer lifetime value tracking.

raw: {"sender": "Kim Johansson", "product": "Inventory", "category": "technical", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Staff account permission settings reverting to full access after each save, allowing employee to see financial data despite restricted permissions."}

parsed.summary: Staff account permission settings reverting to full access after each save, allowing employee to see financial data despite restricted permissions.

expected.summary: Staff account permission restrictions reset to full access after saving and logging out, creating a security risk by exposing financial data to an unauthorized employee.

raw: {"sender": "Sophia Andersen", "product": "Storefront", "category": "technical", "urgency": "medium", "summary": "3-store owner reports admin panel order history loading slowly for stores with more than 5,000 orders (15-20 seconds) and requests bulk order export to Excel."}

parsed.summary: 3-store owner reports admin panel order history loading slowly for stores with more than 5,000 orders (15-20 seconds) and requests bulk order export to Excel.

expected.summary: Admin panel takes 15-20 seconds to load order history for stores with 5,000+ orders. Customer also requests bulk order export to Excel for accounting purposes.

raw: {"sender": "Grace Kim", "product": "Storefront", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Real-time checkout redirect issue suggests store compromise with potential phishing attack. Immediate security investigation required."}

parsed.summary: Real-time checkout redirect issue suggests store compromise with potential phishing attack. Immediate security investigation required.

expected.summary: Store appears to be compromised — customers are being redirected to an unknown website at checkout with no changes made by the owner. Active potential phishing attack affecting real customers.

raw: {"sender": "Robert Chiang", "product": "Storefront", "category": "account", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Prospective customer asking about migration support and downtime for 2,000-product store with 5 years of data."}

parsed.summary: Prospective customer asking about migration support and downtime for 2,000-product store with 5 years of data.

expected.summary: Prospective customer with 2,000 products and 5 years of order history inquires about migration support, potential downtime, and pricing.
